steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: npm workspaces monorepo: frontend/ (Vite+React+TS+Tailwind, eslint flat config, vitest dummy), backend/ (Express+TS, src/app.ts+index.ts with GET /api/health, tsx dev, vitest+supertest, migrate stub), ocr-service/ (FastAPI app/main.py GET /health, app/__init__.py, tests/test_smoke.py, requirements.txt incl pypdf/pypdfium2/reportlab/httpx). Root package.json scripts: lint/build/test (test runs workspace tests + `python3 -m pytest` in ocr-service). .gitignore extended (dist, .env*, storage/, __pycache__). .env.example with DATABASE_URL/BACKEND_PORT/OCR_SERVICE_URL/OCR_PORT/CORS_ORIGIN/STORAGE_DIR/TEMPLATE_PATH/CODEX_AUTH_JSON. assets/malso_application_template.pdf (copied+renamed from root PDF; 12 AcroForm fields verified incl trailing-space 'vehicle_year '), assets/samples/*.jpg. storage/.gitkeep. docs/ filled from master plan: PRD.md (§1), ARCHITECTURE.md (§2.1-2.8), ADR.md (ADR-001..010 + philosophy + 'confirmed codex CLI interface' note), UI_GUIDE.md (§4.1-4.7). Deploy skeleton (TODO-only): Dockerfile.frontend/backend/ocr, docker-compose.yml, render.yaml, README.md. codex CLI: INSTALLED (codex-cli 0.128.0); supports image input `-i/--image`, `-s/--sandbox read-only`, `--skip-git-repo-check`, `--output-last-message <FILE>`, `--json`, `--output-schema <FILE>` — step2 can proceed (image input supported). NOTE: machine has `python3` not `python`; root test script and README use `python3`.

steps.name: db-schema
steps.summary: PostgreSQL schema + pool + idempotent migration (pg, no ORM). backend/src/db/schema.sql: pgcrypto ext, vehicles + documents tables (columns/types exactly per ARCHITECTURE.md §2.4), indexes vehicles_reg_no_norm_idx / vehicles_vin_norm_idx (lower(replace(coalesce(...),' ','')) for partial search), vehicles_updated_at_idx (desc), documents_vehicle_id_idx, partial unique vehicles_vin_uniq (where vin is not null and vin<>''); no updated_at trigger (app sets updated_at=now()). backend/src/db/pool.ts: `pool` (pg.Pool from DATABASE_URL — no module-load crash if unset), `waitForDb(maxAttempts=10)` exponential backoff, `query<T>(sql, params?): Promise<pg.QueryResult<T>>`. backend/src/db/migrate.ts: `runMigrations(): Promise<void>` — waitForDb then runs schema.sql in one txn (idempotent, throws on failure); schema.sql resolved via import.meta.url. backend/src/db/migrate-cli.ts is `npm -w backend run migrate` target (build copies schema.sql to dist/db/). backend/src/index.ts now awaits runMigrations() before listen (exits 1 on failure). GET /api/health now returns {status:'ok', db:'ok'|'down'} via `select 1` ping (step3 adds ocr field). backend/test/migrate.test.ts (skips if no DATABASE_URL): runMigrations twice = no error, to_regclass('vehicles'/'documents') non-null, all 5 indexes present; health.test.ts updated for new shape. Deps added: pg, @types/pg. Verified against local postgres 16: migrate x2 idempotent, tables/indexes/columns correct, all tests pass; npm run build && npm run lint clean.
